Title: Grants free access and parking at airports for veterans
Summary: Grants free access and parking at airports for veterans.
LawCode: Add §14-o, Transp L; add §4-c, Chap 802 of 1947
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the transportation law and chapter 802 of the laws of 1947 relating to facilitating the financing and effectuation of air terminals by the Port of New York Authority, in relation to granting free access and parking at airports for veterans
